task: Compute HEDIS Glycemic Status Assessment for Patients with Diabetes (GSD) HbA1c poor-control sub-measure (HbA1c > 9.0% or missing). Members 18-75 with diabetes (denominator); numerator = most recent HbA1c in measurement period > 9.0% OR no HbA1c documented. Output: { measure, numerator, denominator, rate, members[] }. Lower is better (this is an inverted-direction measure).

recipes.name: hedis-cdc-hba1c
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var b=(input&&input.bundle)||{},es=Array.isArray(b.entry)?b.entry:[],R=(lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules)||{},DM=R.diabetes_icd10||['E11.9'],HL=R.hba1c_loinc||['4548-4'],TH=R.poor_control_threshold_pct||9.0,AR=R.age_range||{min:18,max:75},MY=(input&&input.measurement_year)||2024,P={},C={},O={};function pid(r){return r.subject&&(r.subject.reference||'').split('/').pop()||r.id||'';}for(var i=0;i<es.length;i++){var r=(es[i]&&es[i].resource)||{},t=r.resourceType||'',k=pid(r);if(t==='Patient')P[r.id||k]={bd:r.birthDate||null};else if(t==='Condition'){var cd=(r.code&&r.code.coding&&r.code.coding[0]||{}).code||'';if(DM.indexOf(cd)>=0)(C[k]=C[k]||[]).push(cd);}else if(t==='Observation'){var oc=(r.code&&r.code.coding&&r.code.coding[0]||{}).code||'';if(HL.indexOf(oc)>=0){var v=r.valueQuantity&&r.valueQuantity.value;(O[k]=O[k]||[]).push({date:r.effectiveDateTime||'',value_pct:v,loinc:oc});}}}var n=0,d=0,M=[];for(var k2 in P){var age=MY-parseInt((P[k2].bd||'1900').slice(0,4),10),dx=C[k2]||[];if(dx.length===0||age<AR.min||age>AR.max)continue;d++;var L=(O[k2]||[]).slice().sort(function(a,b){return(b.date||'').localeCompare(a.date||'');})[0]||null,poor=!L||L.value_pct==null||L.value_pct>TH,why=!L||L.value_pct==null?'hba1c_missing':(L.value_pct>TH?'hba1c_gt_9_pct':'hba1c_in_control');if(poor)n++;M.push({member_id_redacted:'<hash>',age:age,diabetes_codes:dx,most_recent_hba1c:L,in_poor_control_numerator:poor,reason:why});}return{measure:'GSD_HBA1C_POOR_CONTROL',spec:'NCQA HEDIS MY 2024+',direction:'inverted',numerator:n,denominator:d,rate:d?n/d:0,members:M};}

pack.description: HEDIS GSD HbA1c poor-control rule library. diabetes_icd10 covers the ICD-10-CM Type 1 (E10.x) and Type 2 (E11.x) diabetes families. hba1c_loinc gives the real LOINC codes for HbA1c. poor_control_threshold_pct pins the NCQA MY 2024+ cut point at 9.0%.
